escalation.rationale: Russia warns of systematic strikes on Kyiv while US launches new attacks on Iranian missile sites amid ongoing negotiations.

ticker_items: Russia warns US citizens to evacuate Kyiv ahead of 'systematic strikes'
US forces strike Iranian missile sites near Strait of Hormuz
Iran-US negotiations continue in Qatar despite escalating attacks
Israel intensifies strikes on Hezbollah positions in southern Lebanon
Trump deploys 5,000 additional troops to Poland

eastern_europe.description: Russia threatens systematic and consistent strikes on Ukrainian capital.

middle_east.description: US forces attacked Iranian missile sites and boats near Strait of Hormuz.
Israeli forces intensify strikes against Hezbollah positions.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

russia.text: Washington should evacuate its embassy because Moscow is planning systematic strikes
russia.speaker: Sergei Lavrov
russia.title: Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: Regional countries would no longer be shields for US bases
middle_east.speaker: Mojtaba Khamenei
middle_east.title: Supreme Leader

observers.description: Reports indicate China secretly trained Russian troops, some of whom have fought in Ukraine. Xi Jinping and Putin signed 20 cooperation pacts at Beijing summit, though anticipated pipeline deal did not materialize.
Qatar emerges as key broker hosting Iranian delegation for talks on extending ceasefire and resolving frozen funds dispute with US.
Trump deploys additional 5,000 US troops to Poland following election of conservative President Karol Nawrocki, reversing Pentagon cancellation.

financial.notes: Russian oil volumes in Singapore reach one-year high amid Middle East supply disruptions.

update_log.text: Russia warns US to evacuate citizens from Kyiv ahead of systematic strikes
US forces strike Iranian missile sites near Strait of Hormuz during Qatar talks
Israeli forces kill at least two in intensified southern Lebanon strikes
Iran's Supreme Leader warns regional states won't shield US bases
